notes: New Zealand entered with no in-tournament injuries but were without pre-squad Matthew Garbett (hamstring, replaced by Logan Rogerson), thinning their creative depth; Egypt had a fully fit squad with no new injury concerns from their Belgium draw, though Salah's role (scorer vs. deeper creator) and Marmoush's poor finishing form were flagged as tactical uncertainties.
